---
title: "Margin Div Test"
papersize: us-letter
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        - ['#note\(alignment: "baseline"']
        - []
      noErrors: default
---

::: {.column-margin}
This content appears in the margin.
:::

Main content here.
